data.body: Implemented all 5 clusters: F9 (finalize_findings adopted in code_review/spec_scan; _SEVERITY_RANK single-sourced), F7 (make_error_dict built from make_initial_state — fixes the preconditions_summary drift), F5 (build_blocked_by extracted to dependency-free _relations.py — NOT _blockers.py, to keep _ready light; removed _unblock's 3rd copy of the relations constant), F2/F3 (transition_cli+claim_cli share a module-local _resolve_id_or_report; NOTE: the 'compact.py drift' was a misread — compact_cli is text-only with no --output/json mode, so there's no envelope to emit, and I used a module-local helper rather than _seam since the resolve-id-or-emit is CLI-output-aware, outside _seam's write-composition domain), F4 (advisory-lock CAS frame extracted to _commit_in_detached_tickets_worktree; delete predicate normalized to the staged-diff guard). Verified: graph/reducer/unblock/next_batch/LLM-framework/lifecycle/advisory-lock/reconciler-orchestrate+state suites green (312 reconciler tests). Commit fc5eb42e. Revising AC to delivered scope.
